---
name: Feature Request / طلب ميزة
about: Suggest an idea for this project / اقتراح فكرة لتحسين المشروع
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? / هل طلبك مرتبط بمشكلة؟
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]
وصف واضح ومختصر للمشكلة.

## Describe the solution you'd like / وصف الحل المطلوب
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered / البدائل التي فكرت بها
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context / معلومات إضافية
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
